{#- Override of ablog/postnavy.html: emit the same markup as the doc prev/next at the bottom of regular pages, so a single CSS rule (prev-next.css) styles both. -#} {% set post = ablog[pagename] %} {% if post.published and ablog.post_show_prev_next and (post.prev or post.next) %}
{% if post.prev %} ‹ Previous {{ post.prev.title|striptags|e }} {% endif %} {% if post.next %} Next {{ post.next.title|striptags|e }} › {% endif %}
{% endif %}
